characters.description: A Refined defender of Alefast whose command of iron and void is joined to broad magical perception. Her new soulbond with Kit lets her control the sanctum's openings and transfer surplus power into it.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: A distinct collaborator who shares Tala's body and assists her thinking and research. Their unusual partnership predates the events of this volume and gives Tala another perspective within their shared existence.
characters.name: Alat

characters.description: Tala's living dimensional refuge and newly soulbound companion. The bond has advanced Kit to Refined power, repaired its damaged magic, and given it the ability to accept Tala's excess power while its travel systems are improved.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: Tala's kinetic-mage friend and a former apprentice of Grediv. He trains with Tala and Cazor, developing tactics and equipment intended to overcome the advantages of iron magic while maintaining his place in Tala's close circle.
characters.name: Rain

characters.description: Tala's flicker-teleporting flockmate and trusted combat partner. His ability to pass through even a minute opening into Kit makes him well suited to testing the sanctum's newly controlled entrances and their practical limits.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: An Alefast Paragon who leads defenders, watches over Rain, and oversees the training around Tala. He is an established authority within the circle handling Alefast's external threats and the development of its defenders.
characters.name: Grediv

characters.description: An iron specialist who spars with Tala and Rain and provides a practical test for Rain's experimental counters to iron magic, including tactics built around magical monopoles.
characters.name: Cazor

characters.description: Banfast's City Stone holder, head of its Archon Council, and a Paragon specializing in soulbonds involving dimensional storage. She evaluates Kit's new bond and begins work on reliable teleportation access.
characters.name: Elnia

characters.description: A fox-like arcane exile who deals in artifacts and arcane goods while concealed by a human illusion. He holds credit owed to Tala through Ingrit and takes a commercial interest in Kit's unusual nature.
characters.name: Lisa

characters.description: Tala's dying mentor, whose condition is failing as she resists the formation of an Archon star.
characters.name: Odara

characters.description: A constructionist and one of Kit's resident co-operators. He works with Elnia's staff to establish incoming and outgoing teleportation for the newly soulbound sanctum while helping assess how its expanded capabilities should be used.
characters.name: Simon

characters.description: A member of Kit's established household who lives and works there alongside Simon. Her cooperation in maintaining the unusual dimensional home predates this volume and makes her one of its continuing resident partners.
characters.name: Petra

characters.description: A gateless researcher who studies artifacts and magical harvests with his family. He is Brandon's father, and neither man can use the gate-based magic available to most humans. His wife directs their family business.
characters.name: Adrill

characters.description: Adrill's gateless son, who has inherited his father's inability to use human gate magic.
characters.name: Brandon

characters.description: Adrill's wife and a gated artifact worker whose family has been disrupted by Adrill's accidental magical change. She asks Tala for a path to enough advancement to preserve a shared future with him instead of accepting a new difference in their lifespans.
characters.name: Brandon's mother

characters.description: Simon and Petra's elder daughter, an academy graduate with healing talent who plans to seek a healer's apprenticeship.
characters.name: Simon and Petra's elder daughter

characters.description: Brandon's mother, who assists Kedva immediately after her magical transformation.
characters.name: Artia

characters.description: Simon and Petra's elder daughter, who knew Tala at the academy and is now training as a healer under Mistress Vanga. She has obtained healing inscriptions.
characters.name: Anna

characters.description: Brandon's partner, whom he hopes might be able to share the life-extending change forced upon him. Her connection to him makes the consequences of his transformation immediately personal and raises the question of whether she could safely follow him.
characters.name: Kedva

characters.description: A visitor who arrives to advise Adrill, Brandon, and Kedva about their magical condition.
characters.name: Nadro

characters.description: A stone mage in Tala's defender unit and a widower still processing his wife's death. Tala seeks his counsel while grieving her own recent loss, recognizing that his experience may offer a healthier way to carry enduring grief.
characters.name: Gert

characters.description: A censured member of the House of Blood who grieves its last heir. After carrying out an unauthorized purge of the House's opponents, she broadcasts a private mourning song strengthened by magic across Platoirie on the anniversary of the heir's death.
characters.name: Mia Lane

characters.description: A dwarf who leads a growing underground settlement open to varied inhabitants. He alone can wield the concept sword Tala gave him, and expeditions to ruins have obtained durable magical power sources for his community.
characters.name: Thrawn

characters.description: The keeper of several mushroom-linked creatures, including Kevin. She investigates the forced Doskanok bond associated with Tala but decides that reproducing it would require conditions too dangerous and uncertain to attempt.
characters.name: Noelle

characters.description: Tala's soulbound weapon, able to change its physical form. Flo is an established part of her equipment and a participant in her combat partnership, combining a personal bond with the practical flexibility of a morphic weapon.
characters.name: Flo

characters.description: A void-and-kinetic mage hunter who restrains Kedva after mistaking her for an arcane. Once her registration is verified, he apologizes, recommends certified identification for her, and agrees to discuss void magic with Tala.
characters.name: Tai

characters.description: Tala's established information-broker liaison. She manages information and credit connected to Tala, providing an ongoing point of contact for arrangements that depend on knowledge, negotiation, and obligations carried between interested parties.
characters.name: Ingrit

characters.description: The principal modern maker of containment-cell cores. His design anchors cells from the Doman Emeth and derives from older cores first made by the people who later became the Leshkin, placing his work behind current containment practice.
characters.name: Jevin

characters.description: Tala's younger sister. She turns down magical advancement and academy enrollment in favor of an ordinary life.
characters.name: Nia

characters.description: An Archon who shares responsibility for the Jasmine Dragon tea shop with his nephew Okus. As Iazo's elder brother, he encourages Okus to avoid his father's damaging pursuit of power. He tells Rain that stopping refinement is a valid choice that can later be reconsidered.
characters.name: Ori

characters.description: The deceased fire mage who became a fount. He was Ori's younger brother and Okus's father, and he died holding a photograph of his family.
characters.name: Iazo

characters.description: An ancient reality mage confined in a deteriorating containment cell. Her gate suppresses magic and void, and she has erased her original name from ordinary reality records.
characters.name: the reality prisoner

characters.description: An exceptionally powerful reforged mage assigned as backup for the mission against the reality prisoner. He prepares tailored natural magic but expects the less advanced defenders to solve whatever lies within their abilities.
characters.name: the reforged mage

characters.description: The giant-wolf pack's young Refined combatant, chosen to test Tala under formal rules. It faces Tala and Terry in a duel where ordinary inscriptions are disabled and the outcome must be surrender or death.
characters.name: the young giant wolf
